pr.title: Fix like button selected state
pr.body: ## Summary - Use the successful `/api/likes` mutation response as the immediate LikeButton state. - Clear the local mutation state once the live Convex query catches up for the same page. - Keep liked/count state scoped to the current URL so navigation does not leak button state. - Simplify the LikeButton readiness gates without changing behavior. - Deduplicate request IP hashing inside the likes API route and remove an unused import. ## Validation - `npx prettier --check "src/lib/LikeButton.svelte" "src/routes/api/likes/+server.ts"` - `npx eslint "src/lib/LikeButton.svelte" "src/routes/api/likes/+server.ts"` - `PUBLIC_CONVEX_URL=https://example.convex.cloud ADMIN_SECRET=dummy npm run build` - `npm run check` currently fails on existing project-wide type/env issues unrelated to the liking changes, including missing Node types/`ADMIN_SECRET`, MD module metadata typing, and Convex generated JS implicit-any diagnostics.
pr.author: injoon5
